title: character_markers schema extension on ANIM-03 reference-pack manifest

not_backfilled_characters_reason.galinda: no canonical marker-identifier source field exists yet; logged as MA-ANIM-14-MARKERS-GALINDA
not_backfilled_characters_reason.emma: no canonical marker-identifier source field exists yet; logged as MA-ANIM-14-MARKERS-EMMA
not_backfilled_characters_reason.lirian: no canonical marker-identifier source field exists yet; logged as MA-ANIM-14-MARKERS-LIRIAN

ANIM-13-projects.json.grog_playground_diff: removed character_markers + character_markers_provenance_source_path + character_markers_provenance_field + character_markers_provenance_sha256; replaced with explanatory character_markers_note pointing at ANIM-03
ANIM-13-projects.json.purpose: forces the ANIM-03 lookup path to be exercised end-to-end on the only currently-registered project

muscle_shot_storyboard_agent.py.anim14_r1_F2_fix: AUDIT_ROOT honors APEX_PHASE_AUDIT_DIR env (relative paths rebased on REPO_ROOT). Default remains apex/audit/anim-13 for backward compat. ANIM-14 phase runs set APEX_PHASE_AUDIT_DIR=apex/audit/anim-14 to land evidence in this phase's namespace.
muscle_shot_storyboard_agent.py.anim14_r2_F5_fix: _verify_markers_against_source() type-guards json.loads result; top-level non-object JSON returns CHARACTER_MARKERS_SOURCE_UNPARSEABLE; non-string source field returns CHARACTER_MARKERS_FIELD_MISSING with error context; non-string recorded marker returns CHARACTER_MARKERS_VALUE_MISMATCH with error context.
muscle_shot_storyboard_agent.py.anim14_r3_F6_fix: Restored strict manifest_partial semantics — CHARACTER_MARKERS_MANIFEST_PARTIAL fires UNCONDITIONALLY when ANIM-03's character block is 3-of-4 fields present, regardless of whether projects.json carries an override. This supersedes the r1 F-3 softening; SPEC-ANIM-14 §Schema extension was tightened to make the unconditional re-validation explicit. Trade-off: a project with its own valid marker block still cannot run if the manifest's marker block for the bound character is registry-inconsistent — but this forces the registry to be fixed before any work for that character proceeds, which is the safer doctrine-compliant default.

1_projects_json_still_carrying_markers_p.note: ANIM-14 cross-check on both paths (projects.json + ANIM-03 entry both present and byte-equal); projects.json wins precedence

2_projects_json_marker_block_removed_pos.note: ANIM-03 lookup path; emitted markers byte-equal to pre-migration value

3_validate_post_migration.note: section deltas + coverage identical to ANIM-13 baseline; ANIM-03 lookup path produces wire-equivalent output

negative_path_summary.CHARACTER_MARKERS_NOT_FOUND: fires when project AND manifest both omit the marker block
negative_path_summary.CHARACTER_MARKERS_MANIFEST_PARTIAL_when_: (probe pm_probe) fires when ANIM-03 manifest's marker block is 3-of-4 fields present; with this probe's cfg the project also declares nothing, so the fallback path needs the manifest
negative_path_summary.CHARACTER_MARKERS_MANIFEST_PARTIAL_uncon: (probe proj_full_manifest_partial_probe, r3 F-6 strict semantics) fires even when projects.json carries a full verifiable marker block — the manifest's partial registration is itself a doctrine violation, so the agent refuses to run any project bound to that character until the manifest is repaired
negative_path_summary.CHARACTER_MARKERS_VALUE_MISMATCH (manife: fires when ANIM-03 records wrong character_markers text; sha + field still verified against named source
negative_path_summary.CHARACTER_MARKERS_SOURCE_CONFLICT: fires when projects.json AND ANIM-03 both verified-OK individually (against different fields in same source file) but recorded marker text differs
negative_path_summary.OK_via_manifest_only: happy path with markers from ANIM-03 lookup only
negative_path_summary.OK_via_projects_json_override: happy path with markers from projects.json (manifest may or may not also declare them, but must NOT be partial; if both declare, marker text must be byte-equal)

silent_twice_progress.comment: R4 surfaced 2 HIGH on stale evidence (not code); silent-twice clock reset. Resolver code itself was confirmed clean by R4: 'I found no code-path HIGH in muscle_shot_storyboard_agent.py'. R5 + R6 must both be HIGH-empty for silent-twice to close.
